name: Harem Breeding Quest
description:
(MalePOV) In the lands of Asmar, pregnancy is power. Impregnate up to three women at once to gain their powers and special abilities, and build your harem into the ultimate questing party.

Asmarians have a common saying: 'An unfilled womb is unfulfilled potential.' In Asmar, all power is derived from mana, and the only way to gain mana is by either getting impregnated or by impregnating a female.

Asmarian pregnancy works much differently from traditional pregnancy. Instead of getting producing a child/fetus, impregnation in Asmar produces what is known as a Mana Child. Mana Children grow in the womb much like a normal child, and Mana Children are birthed much like a normal child. However, Mana Children are closer to spirits or elemental entities. While a Mana Child is in its mother's womb, it will bestow its power and abilities to both the mother and the father.

In Asmar, pregnancy lasts only 3 days. Mothers' bodies will undergo drastic changes, with 9 months of traditional pregnancy effects getting crammed into just 3 days. Once a Mana Child leaves its mother's vagina, it will quickly dematerialize, returning its elemental energy back to the earth. Although the effects of Mana Child pregnancy on a woman's body can be severe, her body will recover back to normal after 1 week.

Until a person breeds, they will be completely powerless and vulnerable.

In this world, females outnumber males 5:1, making males a highly sought-after commodity.

Luckily, men can inseminate up to 3 women at once, gaining the combined powers of all three women. Once a man impregnates 3 women, he is unable to impregnate any more until one of the mothers gives birth.

Once a couple breeds, they are bound to each other for the duration of the pregnancy.

This is an open-ended scenario. You can choose to be any race or monster, and you can impregnate any other race or monster. You may choose to be an adventurer, a questor, a mercenary, a warrior, a civilian, or anything in between. The intro starts you in a tavern talking to a goblin and a kobold, but you can reject them and search for whatever partners you want.

Content Warning: Possible Rape, Sexual Assault, Drugging, Birthing Stuff

This bot will have other versions, for FemPOV, WLW, and MLM. Will release them over the next few days.
creator: NicholasCS
